class.name: ASComponent
class.brief_description: Core component for managing abilities, attributes, and effects.
class.description: The [ASComponent] (ASC) is the central hub for an actor's logic. It handles the lifecycle of abilities, applies effects, and tracks attribute values. Must be a child of [CharacterBody2D] or [CharacterBody3D].

method.name: _on_calculate_custom_magnitude
method.description: Virtual callback for computing custom magnitude values for effect modifiers.

method.name: add_attribute_set
method.description: Adds a unique instance of the attribute set to this component.

method.name: add_tag
method.description: Adds a tag to the actor.

method.name: apply_container
method.description: Initializes the component with an archetype blueprint (AttributeSet, Catalog, and Initial Effects).

method.name: apply_effect_by_resource
method.description: Directly applies an effect to this actor without checking activation requirements.

method.name: apply_effect_by_tag
method.description: Directly applies an effect from the container catalog to this actor by its tag, without checking activation requirements.

method.name: apply_effect_spec_to_self
method.description: Applies an already-built effect spec to this actor. Validates all four tag conditions on the effect resource before applying (required_all, required_any, blocked_any, blocked_all). Emits [signal effect_failed] if any tag check fails.

method.name: apply_effect_spec_to_target
method.description: Applies an effect instance to another target component.

method.name: apply_package
method.description: Unpacks and applies all effects and cues contained in the [ASPackage] to this component.

method.name: apply_snapshot
method.description: Restores the component's state (attributes, tags, and active effects) from a previously captured snapshot. Attempts to recover from the internal lightweight cache (ASStateCache) first. This cache is a circular buffer that stores the last 128 ticks automatically. If the requested tick is older than the buffer capacity, the system falls back to the assigned [member snapshot_state] resource.

method.name: calculate_effect_duration
method.description: Calculates the duration of an effect spec, considering custom magnitude overrides.

method.name: calculate_modifier_magnitude
method.description: Calculates the magnitude of a modifier within an effect spec.

method.name: can_activate_ability_by_resource
method.description: Returns true if the specified ability resource is unlocked and its requirements (tags, costs, cooldown) are met.

method.name: can_activate_ability_by_tag
method.description: Returns true if an ability with the specified tag is unlocked and its requirements are met.

method.name: can_activate_cue_by_resource
method.description: Checks if the specified cue resource can be activated. Verifies all four tag conditions: [member ASCue.activation_required_all_tags] (AND), [member ASCue.activation_required_any_tags] (OR), [member ASCue.activation_blocked_any_tags] (OR), and [member ASCue.activation_blocked_all_tags] (AND).

method.name: can_activate_cue_by_tag
method.description: Checks if a cue with the specified tag can be activated.

method.name: can_activate_effect_by_resource
method.description: Checks if the specified effect resource can be applied to this component. Verifies all four tag conditions: [member ASEffect.activation_required_all_tags] (AND), [member ASEffect.activation_required_any_tags] (OR), [member ASEffect.activation_blocked_any_tags] (OR), and [member ASEffect.activation_blocked_all_tags] (AND). Also verifies attribute requirements.

method.name: can_activate_effect_by_tag
method.description: Checks if an effect with the specified tag can be applied.

method.name: cancel_ability_by_resource
method.description: Cancels the execution of the specified ability resource.

method.name: cancel_ability_by_tag
method.description: Cancels all active abilities that match the specified tag.

method.name: cancel_all_abilities
method.description: Forcefully cancels all currently active abilities.

method.name: cancel_cue_by_resource
method.description: Cancels the specified cue resource.

method.name: cancel_cue_by_tag
method.description: Cancels all active cues that match the specified tag.

method.name: cancel_effect_by_resource
method.description: Cancels the specified effect resource.

method.name: cancel_effect_by_tag
method.description: Cancels all active effects that match the specified tag.

method.name: capture_snapshot
method.description: Captures the current state of attributes and tags. The state is always pushed to an internal circular buffer (lightweight cache) for multiplayer prediction and rollback. If [member snapshot_state] is assigned, it also populates that resource for persistent storage or long-term synchronization.

method.name: clear_ability_history
method.description: Clears the chronological buffer of ability activation events on this component.

method.name: clear_all_history
method.description: Clears every chronological and historical buffer on this component (Tags, Attributes, Abilities, Effects, Cues, and Events).

method.name: clear_attribute_history
method.description: Clears the chronological buffer of attribute changes on this component.

method.name: clear_conditional_history
method.description: Clears the short-term historical buffer for [constant ASTagUtils.CONDITIONAL] tags on this component.

method.name: clear_cue_history
method.description: Clears the chronological buffer of visual cue events on this component.

method.name: clear_effect_history
method.description: Clears the chronological buffer of effect application and removal events on this component.

method.name: clear_effects
method.description: Removes all active effects from the actor immediately.

method.name: clear_event_history
method.description: Clears all events from the historical buffer.

method.name: clear_name_history
method.description: Clears the short-term historical buffer for [constant ASTagUtils.NAME] tags on this component.

method.name: clear_tag_history
method.description: Clears all short-term tag history buffers (NAME and CONDITIONAL) on the component.

method.name: confirm_ability_activation
method.description: Confirms a previously predicted ability activation (Server-side confirmation).

method.name: dispatch_event
method.description: Dispatches a transient ASEventTag to this component. The event is broadcast to all listeners and stored in the short-term historical buffer ([method has_event_occurred]). This is the preferred way to signal non-persistent occurrences (e.g. Impact, Hit, Achievement).

method.name: find_effect_by_tag
method.description: Searches the archetype container and all currently unlocked abilities to find the [ASEffect] resource associated with the given tag.

method.name: get_ability_cooldown_preview
method.description: Retrieves the base cooldown defined in the ability resource catalog for preview purposes.

method.name: get_ability_cost_preview
method.description: Retrieves the base cost for a specific attribute of an ability from the catalog. Useful for UI tooltips.

method.name: get_ability_duration_preview
method.description: Retrieves the base duration defined in the ability resource catalog.

method.name: get_ability_history
method.description: Retrieves the buffer of ability lifecycle events (Started, Finished, etc.) within the requested timeframe. Each entry is a [Dictionary] representing an ASAbilityHistorical record.

method.name: get_ability_history_size
method.description: Returns the current size of the ability history buffer.

method.name: get_active_abilities
method.description: Returns a list of all abilities currently executing on this actor.

method.name: get_active_cues
method.description: Returns a list of all active feedback cues (VFX/SFX) currently running on this actor.

method.name: get_active_effects
method.description: Returns a list of all active effect instances (buffs, debuffs, etc.) applied to this actor.

method.name: get_animation_player
method.description: Returns the registered AnimationPlayer or AnimatedSprite node.

method.name: get_attribute_base_value_by_resource
method.description: Returns the unmodified base value of the specified attribute resource.

method.name: get_attribute_base_value_by_tag
method.description: Returns the unmodified base value of the attribute identified by the tag.

method.name: get_attribute_history
method.description: Retrieves chronological entries of attribute modifications within the requested timeframe. Each entry is a [Dictionary] representing an ASAttributeHistorical record.

method.name: get_attribute_history_size
method.description: Returns the current size of the attribute history buffer.

method.name: get_attribute_last_delta
method.description: Retrieves the final delta (change amount) for the specified attribute from the last historical entry. Returns 0.0 if no history exists for that attribute.

method.name: get_attribute_max_value
method.description: Retrieves the maximum value (ceiling) defined for the attribute resource.

method.name: get_attribute_percent
method.description: Returns the ratio of [method get_attribute_value_by_tag] to [method get_attribute_max_value]. Useful for health bars and resource gauges.

method.name: get_attribute_sets
method.description: Returns the list of attribute sets attached to this component.

method.name: get_attribute_value_by_resource
method.description: Returns the current value of the specified attribute resource.

method.name: get_attribute_value_by_tag
method.description: Returns the current value of the attribute identified by the tag.

method.name: get_audio_player
method.description: Returns the registered AudioStreamPlayer node.

method.name: get_conditional_history_size
method.description: Returns the number of entries currently stored in the conditional history buffer.

method.name: get_cooldown_percent
method.description: Returns the completion ratio of the cooldown (remaining / initial duration). Returns 0.0 if not on cooldown.

method.name: get_cooldown_remaining
method.description: Returns the time remaining for a specific cooldown tag.

method.name: get_cue_history
method.description: Retrieves the buffer of visual cue events occurred within the last [param lookback_sec] seconds. Each entry is a [Dictionary] representing an ASCueHistorical record.

method.name: get_cue_history_size
method.description: Returns the current size of the cue history buffer.

method.name: get_cue_resource
method.description: Returns the cue resource associated with the specified tag.

method.name: get_effect_history
method.description: Retrieves the buffer of effect lifecycle events within the requested timeframe. Each entry is a [Dictionary] representing an ASEffectHistorical record.

method.name: get_effect_history_size
method.description: Returns the current size of the effect history buffer.

method.name: get_event_history_size
method.description: Returns the number of entries currently stored in the event history buffer.

method.name: get_name_history_size
method.description: Returns the number of entries currently stored in the name history buffer.

method.name: get_node_ptr
method.description: Returns a registered node by its alias.

method.name: get_owned_tags
method.description: Exposes the internal tag manager [ASTagSpec] for detailed inspections. Use this to bypass the high-level API and access refcounts or recursive hierarchy queries directly.

method.name: get_registered_cues
method.description: Returns the list of all cue resources currently registered with this component.

method.name: get_tags
method.description: Returns an array of all tags currently owned by the actor.

method.name: get_unlocked_abilities
method.description: Returns a list of all abilities currently unlocked for this actor.

method.name: has_active_effect_by_resource
method.description: Returns true if the specified effect resource is currently active.

method.name: has_active_effect_by_tag
method.description: Returns true if an effect with the specified tag is currently active.

method.name: has_attribute_by_resource
method.description: Returns true if the component has the specified attribute resource.

method.name: has_attribute_by_tag
method.description: Returns true if the component has an attribute with the specified tag.

method.name: has_event_occurred
method.description: Checks the internal historical buffer for a specific event tag that occurred within the last [param lookback_sec] seconds. Highly efficient for reactive logic and ability requirements.

method.name: has_tag
method.description: Checks for tag presence.

method.name: is_ability_active
method.description: Returns true if an ability with the specified tag is currently executing.

method.name: is_ability_unlocked
method.description: Returns true if the ability tag is present in the unlocked list of the component.

method.name: is_montage_playing
method.description: Returns true if a montage (animation) is currently playing on the target.

method.name: is_on_cooldown
method.description: Checks if a specific tag is on cooldown.

method.name: lock_ability_by_resource
method.description: Removes the ability from the unlocked list and cancels it if active.

method.name: lock_ability_by_tag
method.description: Removes the ability matching the tag from the unlocked list.

method.name: make_outgoing_spec
method.description: Creates a validated effect instance.

method.name: play_montage
method.description: Plays a montage (animation) on a specific target node.

method.name: play_sound
method.description: Plays a sound stream on a specific target node.

method.name: register_cue_resource
method.description: Registers a cue resource for runtime lookup.

method.name: register_node
method.description: Registers a node with an alias for use by cues and effects.

method.name: remove_active_effect
method.description: Forcefully removes an active effect instance.

method.name: remove_all_tags
method.description: Removes all tags from the component and triggers associated events and ability triggers.

method.name: remove_effect_by_resource
method.description: Removes all active instances of the given effect resource.

method.name: remove_effect_by_tag
method.description: Removes all active effects that match the given tag.

method.name: remove_tag
method.description: Removes a tag.

method.name: request_activate_ability
method.description: Requests the server to activate an ability. Used for client-side prediction and RPC communication.

method.name: set_animation_player
method.description: Registers the node to be used for animations (AnimationPlayer or AnimatedSprite).

method.name: set_attribute_base_value_by_resource
method.description: Directly sets the base value of the specified attribute resource.

method.name: set_attribute_base_value_by_tag
method.description: Directly sets the base value of an attribute by its tag.

method.name: set_audio_player
method.description: Registers the node to be used for audio (AudioStreamPlayer).

method.name: start_cooldown
method.description: Manually starts a cooldown with a specific tag and duration.

method.name: tick
method.description: Manually advances the component's internal simulation by [param delta] seconds. This is called automatically during the physics step.

method.name: try_activate_ability_by_resource
method.description: Attempts to activate an ability using its resource reference. Supports hierarchical linking via [param parent_id].

method.name: try_activate_ability_by_tag
method.description: Attempts to activate an ability by its unique tag.

method.name: try_activate_cue_by_resource
method.description: Attempts to activate a cue resource if requirements are met.

method.name: try_activate_cue_by_tag
method.description: Attempts to activate a cue by tag if requirements are met.

method.name: try_activate_effect_by_resource
method.description: Attempts to apply an effect resource if requirements are met.

method.name: try_activate_effect_by_tag
method.description: Attempts to apply an effect by tag if requirements are met.

method.name: unlock_ability_by_resource
method.description: Adds an ability resource to the unlocked list in the primary attribute set.

method.name: unlock_ability_by_tag
method.description: Finds the ability in the catalog and adds it to the unlocked list.

method.name: unregister_cue_resource
method.description: Unregisters the cue resource associated with the specified tag.

method.name: unregister_node
method.description: Unregisters the node alias.

members.member: The archetype blueprint for this actor.
The resource used for capturing and restoring the component's state. Primarily used for players and persistence.

signal.name: ability_failed
signal.description: Emitted when an ability fails to activate, providing the reason.

signal.name: cooldown_ended
signal.description: Emitted when a cooldown duration reaches zero.

signal.name: cooldown_started
signal.description: Emitted when a new cooldown starts.

signal.name: cue_failed
signal.description: Emitted when a cue fails to activate.

signal.name: effect_applied
signal.description: Emitted when an effect is successfully applied to the component.

signal.name: effect_failed
signal.description: Emitted when an effect fails to apply.

signal.name: effect_removed
signal.description: Emitted when an active effect is removed.

signal.name: event_received
signal.description: Emitted when an ASEventTag is dispatched to this component. Used for transient signals.

signal.name: tag_changed
signal.description: Emitted when persistent tags (states) are added or removed.

signal.name: tag_event_received
signal.description: Emitted when a tag-based event containing a data payload is received. Similar to [signal event_received] but optimized for logic requiring specific data dictionaries without instigator or magnitude metadata.
